name: browser-mutation
description: Capture live browser UI edits as structured mutation intent for Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Turn live UI edits into Codex-ready deltas.
interface.longDescription: Injects a local browser overlay for selecting, editing, moving, resizing, reparenting, and reordering rendered elements, then captures the finished state as structured mutation records for Codex source edits.
defaultPrompt: Start Browser Mutation on this local page.
Apply the latest Browser Mutation edits.
Show me the captured UI deltas.
